name: Khagra's Ravagers
inspire: After the last Action step in a battle round, if there are 2 or more desecrated treasure tokens, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Razed Realm
reactions.trigger: You can use this ability once per Power step.
reactions.flavorText: The Ravagers leave naught but ruin in their wake.
reactions.rulesText: You can use this ability once per Power step. Pick a treasure token held by a friendly fighter. That treasure token is desecrated until it is flipped.

reactions.name: Ritual Desecration
reactions.trigger: Immediately after an enemy fighter is slain, if the attacker or target was holding a treasure token.
reactions.flavorText: Through slaughter and blood are the realms desecrated.
reactions.rulesText: Immediately after an enemy fighter is slain, if the attacker or target was holding a treasure token, you can pick that treasure token. That treasure token is desecrated until it is flipped.

abilities.name: Dark Approval
abilities.flavorText: To catch the attention of the Dark Gods is to be lavishly rewarded.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Draw 1 Power card for each desecrated treasure token. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: The Eye of the Gods
abilities.flavorText: To court the gaze of the Dark Gods is perilous – but those who prove worthy are made mighty indeed.
abilities.rulesText:
Pick 1 of the following:
• Use this immediately after a friendly fighter holding a treasure token is picked to be the target of an Attack. The target has +1 Save for that Attack.
• Use this immediately after you pick an enemy fighter holding a treasure token to be the target of an Attack. The weapon you picked for that Attack has +1 Attack dice for that Attack.
You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Ravaging Advance
abilities.flavorText: Chaos Warriors never falter in their zealous campaign to desecrate all before them.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter a number of hexes up to the number of desecrated treasure tokens. That push must end on a treasure token and/or adjacent to an enemy fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.
